case_for: Agholor flashed spike-week upside as recently as week 8 with 12.6 points, showing he retains touchdown-dependent big-play ceiling in this offense.
case_against: His role is consistently marginal, with five of six recent games under 4 points and a pregame projection of just 3.9, indicating a low-volume, boom-or-bust role that rarely clears a 12-point bar.
